---
name: New role request
about: Propose a new professional review role
title: "[Role]: "
labels: role-request
assignees: ""
---

## Role name

Proposed role name and slug.

## Why this role is needed

Explain the review gap it covers.

## Existing roles considered

List existing roles that overlap and why they are not enough.

## Lifecycle stages

Discovery, definition, design, architecture, implementation, verification, launch, operation, or postmortem.

## Evidence this role needs

List the artifacts or signals the role should inspect.

## Likely conflicts

List roles this role may disagree with.
